title: Cannot login to account
description: Customer reports login page keeps refreshing and does not accept credentials.

title: Payment failed during checkout
description: Customer tried to pay with card but transaction was declined.

title: App crashes on launch
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after opening on Android devices.

title: Request refund for damaged product
description: Customer received damaged item and wants a refund.

title: Unable to reset password
description: Customer did not receive password reset email.

title: Website loading very slow
description: Homepage takes too long to load on mobile devices.

title: Incorrect billing amount
description: Customer was charged twice for the same order.

title: Notifications not working
description: User not receiving push notifications from the app.

title: Account deletion request
description: Customer wants to permanently delete their account.

title: Profile update not saving
description: Customer cannot save changes made in profile settings.
